questionHtml: Use an appropriate test to determine whether showing an improvement is independent of gender.
markschemeHtml:
H 0 : improvement and gender are independent

H 1 : improvement and gender are not independent        A1

choice of χ 2 test for independence        (M1)

groups first two columns as expected values in first column less than 5        M1

new observed table

        (A1)

p -value = 0.581        A1

no significant evidence that gender and improvement are dependent        R1
